description: Lock Advanced Hunting & Gathering to a source-backed broad forager-lifeway synthesis with explicit date uncertainty, not a generic unsourced placeholder.

checks.reason: The broad synthesis node uses a conservative early-Holocene anchor while documenting older source-backed component technologies.
Composite hunting tools supply the material toolkit basis for this advanced forager package.
Animal tracking and movement interpretation are part of source-backed hunter-gatherer hunting practice.
Spearthrowers represent source-backed long-distance hunting technology in advanced forager toolkits.
